tagline: Building cinematic digital experiences with modern web technologies & DevOps.
description: Building cinematic digital experiences, scalable systems, and DevOps solutions with modern web technologies.
bio: Full Stack + DevOps Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable web applications and CI/CD pipelines using MERN, Next.js, Laravel, and modern DevOps tools. Specialized in cloud infrastructure, containerization, microservices, and production ready architectures with a strong focus on automation, scalability, and clean system design. Experienced across the full stack from frontend architecture to server orchestration, Docker containers, Redis caching, and automated deployment pipelines.

bullets: Implemented containerized environments using Docker and optimized deployment workflows, cutting local setup time by 35% and improving developer onboarding productivity.
Designed and configured robust CI/CD pipelines for automated application releases, reducing pipeline execution latency by 25% and cutting build failure rates.
Developed and deployed an AI Task Manager built with the MERN stack; containerized using Docker and hosted on AWS with secure automated pipelines.
experience.desc: Implemented Docker containerization and automated CI/CD deployment pipelines for high-performance applications, reducing setup times 35% and securing a 99.9% release success rate with remote UK engineering teams.

bullets: Designed and implemented Docker container environments and automated staging-to-production deployment pipelines for complex Laravel systems, boosting deployment efficiency by 30%.
Engineered and deployed an AI-based Gym Management System built with Laravel; hosted the platform on AWS EC2/RDS with optimized Nginx configurations.
Re-architected cloud infrastructure security and resource distribution, successfully reducing monthly hosting costs by 20% while sustaining zero service downtime.
experience.desc: Orchestrated Docker environments and custom Laravel deployment pipelines. Managed Linux/Nginx infrastructure, improving server response times by 40% and cutting hosting costs by 20% with zero downtime.

bullets: Architected highly available, auto-scaled AWS/Kubernetes infrastructure (EKS) maintaining 99.99% system uptime.
Designed and deployed a high-throughput MERN-based Data Scraper on AWS, orchestrating distributed worker nodes to process large-scale datasets.
Configured centralized ELK/Grafana log aggregations, reducing mean time to detect (MTTD) production anomalies by 60%.
experience.desc: Architected auto-scaled AWS infrastructure and Kubernetes clusters ensuring 99.99% uptime. Automated CI/CD deployments reducing pipeline speeds by 40%.

projects.title: ArtGenio
projects.subtitle: AI Prompt Marketplace & Creator Platform
projects.desc: Full-scale AI-powered marketplace for influencers and businesses. Features a subscription-based Creator Hub with 6 AI tools,Payment integration support for both international and domestic payments, scalable backend with MongoDB, and a complete admin dashboard for managing users, prompts, and analytics.

projects.title: EasyFolio
projects.subtitle: Multi-User Portfolio Platform
projects.desc: Full-stack multi-user portfolio platform enabling dynamic, database-driven portfolios with multiple themes. Role-based admin system, real-time content editing, PDF CV parsing, portfolio completion tracking.

publications.title: Building a Real-Time Multiplayer Tic Tac Toe with Next.js & Socket.IO
publications.desc: Deep dive into building a real-time multiplayer game using WebSockets and a server-authoritative architecture. Covers room-based communication, state synchronization, and handling real-time events using Socket.IO.

publications.title: Optimizing Node.js Performance with Clustering
publications.desc: Explains how to improve Node.js performance using clustering to utilize multi-core systems. Covers process management, scaling strategies, and performance optimization techniques.

publications.title: Stripe Subscriptions Simplified with React & Node.js
publications.desc: Guide to implementing subscription-based payment systems with Stripe. Covers billing flows, recurring payments, and integration with full-stack applications.

publications.title: Building Scalable Laravel Applications with Docker
publications.desc: Explains how to containerize Laravel applications using Docker for consistent local development and production deployments. Covers multi-stage builds and optimization.
